ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city */,
  "nearest_airport" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest airport */,
  "nearest_railway_station" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest railway station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "from_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting city */,
  "to_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination city */,
  "road_distance_km" INTEGER /* Road distance between the cities in kilometers */,
  "air_distance_km" REAL /* Air distance between the cities in kilometers */,
  "rail_distance_km" INTEGER /* Rail distance between the cities in kilometers */,
  "estimated_fuel_cost" REAL /* Estimated fuel cost for road and rail travel */,
  "estimated_emissions" REAL /* Estimated carbon emissions for different modes of transportation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the route data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_from_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_to_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_times" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel time entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., Air, Rail, Road) */,
  "travel_time_hrs" REAL /* Estimated travel time in hours */,
  "wait_time_hrs" REAL /* Average wait time at the starting point for the mode of transport */,
  "frequency_per_day" INTEGER /* Frequency of the mode of transport per day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the travel time data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_times_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel cost entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., Air, Rail, Road) */,
  "cost_estimate" REAL /* Estimated travel cost in local currency */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate available for the mode of transport */,
  "peak_time_surcharge" REAL /* Surcharge during peak travel times */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the travel cost data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_costs_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "preferred_mode" TEXT /* Preferred mode of transportation (e.g., Air, Rail, Road) */,
  "preferred_time" REAL /* Preferred travel time in hours */,
  "preferred_cost" REAL /* Preferred travel cost in local currency */,
  "preferred_frequency" TEXT /* Preferred frequency of travel (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "preferred_cabin_class" TEXT /* Preferred cabin class for air travel (e.g., economy, business) */,
  "preferred_seat_type" TEXT /* Preferred seat type for rail travel (e.g., window, aisle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_preferences_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, logistician, client) */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transportation used */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of the travel */,
  "travel_time_hrs" REAL /* Actual travel time in hours */,
  "travel_cost" REAL /* Actual travel cost in local currency */,
  "booking_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "travel_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the travel (e.g., business, personal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_logs_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "service_quality" INTEGER /* Rating for the service quality */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the comfort of the mode of transport */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_reviews_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route update */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route being updated */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., Distance Change, Time Change, Cost Change) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_updates_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_updates_update_by FOREIGN KEY ("update_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
